bird.name: Flame-crowned flowerpecker
bird.summary: The flame-crowned flowerpecker (Dicaeum kampalili) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae. It is endemic to Mindanao in the Philippin…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Flame-crowned flowerpecker
relations.evidence: thumb|Preserved specimen at Naturalis Biodiversity Center It inhabits tropic moist montane forest at mossy forest above 1,300 meters above sea level. IUCN has assessed this bird as least-concern with its population being estimated as 10,000 to 19,999 mature individuals

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Flame-crowned flowerpecker
relations.evidence: Forest loss is a threat especially in its lower altitude limits which are more prone to legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmland
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
